lyrics.text: I was looking at the sky, it opened up
lyrics.translation: 我曾眺望着无边的天际

lyrics.text: Saw you coming down, like Gabriel
lyrics.translation: 看着你如同上帝的使者般到来

lyrics.text: And  my  will began, right then and there
lyrics.translation: 此时此刻你便是我最大的祈愿

lyrics.text: Not even the angels could compare
lyrics.translation: 远比天使更令人着迷

lyrics.text: A sight of, like a telescope
lyrics.translation: 在那望远镜中

lyrics.text: Just you and I, lost in the moment
lyrics.translation: 时光为你我停留在这一瞬

lyrics.text: You pull me close, and kiss me slow
lyrics.translation: 你轻轻地靠近我，落下你温柔的吻

lyrics.text: And everything comes into focus
lyrics.translation: 除了你整个世界都黯然失色

lyrics.text: A sight of, from a telescope
lyrics.translation: 透过望远镜的遐想是如此美好

lyrics.text: But I was just happy to  be  there
lyrics.translation: 清醒后的我也不曾遗憾

lyrics.text: It was beautiful
lyrics.translation: 因为那是如此美丽

lyrics.text: Beautiful...
lyrics.translation: 如此令人着迷

lyrics.text: I  climb up  to the stars, they stand in line
lyrics.translation: 我的目光越过星空

lyrics.text: Waiting for the change to cross your mind
lyrics.translation: 像星星等待着月儿，我等待着你

lyrics.text: Maybe all we got, is this one night?
lyrics.translation: 也许今晚的一切只不过幻想

lyrics.text: But I see forever in your eyes
lyrics.translation: 但在你的眼中我看到了永恒

lyrics.text: A sight of, like a telescope
lyrics.translation: 在那望远镜中

lyrics.text: Just you and I, lost in the moment
lyrics.translation: 时光为你我停留在这一瞬

lyrics.text: You pull me close, and kiss me slow
lyrics.translation: 你轻轻靠近我，落下你温柔的吻

lyrics.text: And everything comes into focus
lyrics.translation: 除了你整个世界都黯然失色

lyrics.text: A sight of, from a telescope
lyrics.translation: 透过望远镜的遐想是如此美好

lyrics.text: But I was just happy to  be there
lyrics.translation: 清醒后的我也不曾遗憾

lyrics.text: It was beautiful
lyrics.translation: 因为那是如此美丽

lyrics.text: Beautiful...
lyrics.translation: 如此令人着迷

lyrics.text: A sight of, like a telescope
lyrics.translation: 在那望远镜中

lyrics.text: Just you and I, lost in the moment
lyrics.translation: 多希望时间不再流逝

lyrics.text: You pull me  close, and kiss me slow
lyrics.translation: 你轻轻靠近我，落下你温柔的吻

lyrics.text: And everything comes into focus
lyrics.translation: 我的心中再装不下任何事物

lyrics.text: A sight of, from a telescope
lyrics.translation: 眼前的一切似乎只是虚幻

lyrics.text: But I was  just happy to be  there
lyrics.translation: 但我仍然向往着美好

lyrics.text: It was beautiful
lyrics.translation: 那不曾拥有的美好
